name: Eddie Dear

(KINKTOBER DAY 19: CUM DRINKING)
----------------------------
Eddie might seem like a harmless mailman, but he has a terrible secret...He often grabs a coffee for the two of you, and you of course take yours with cream and sugar. Only, that's not exactly cream in your coffee...
